description: Determines what a caller's voice sounds like in the Moonlight Radio scenario. Helps characterize the caller and give their dialogue additional context.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines what a caller's voice sounds like in the Moonlight Radio scenario. Helps characterize the caller and give their dialogue additional context.

entries.result: High: The caller has a high pitched, melodic voice

resultTranslations.en: High: The caller has a high pitched, melodic voice

entries.result: Deep: The caller has a deep, baritone voice

resultTranslations.en: Deep: The caller has a deep, baritone voice

entries.result: Child: The caller sounds like a very young child

resultTranslations.en: Child: The caller sounds like a very young child

entries.result: Older: The caller sounds very old

resultTranslations.en: Older: The caller sounds very old

entries.result: Bright: The caller has a bright, cheerful voice

resultTranslations.en: Bright: The caller has a bright, cheerful voice

entries.result: Energetic: The caller is excited or is high energy

resultTranslations.en: Energetic: The caller is excited or is high energy

entries.result: Raspy: The caller has a raspy, hoarse voice

resultTranslations.en: Raspy: The caller has a raspy, hoarse voice

entries.result: Shy: The caller sounds extremely shy

resultTranslations.en: Shy: The caller sounds extremely shy

entries.result: Intellectual: The caller likes to expound and focus on facts and details

resultTranslations.en: Intellectual: The caller likes to expound and focus on facts and details

entries.result: Scared: The caller sounds worried or frightened

resultTranslations.en: Scared: The caller sounds worried or frightened

entries.result: Casual: The caller speaks casually and comfortably

resultTranslations.en: Casual: The caller speaks casually and comfortably

entries.result: Jokey: The caller tries to make a joke of whatever they're talking about

resultTranslations.en: Jokey: The caller tries to make a joke of whatever they're talking about

entries.result: Vocal Fry: The caller's voice is low pitched, with a rough, creaky quality to it

resultTranslations.en: Vocal Fry: The caller's voice is low pitched, with a rough, creaky quality to it

entries.result: Confused: The caller sounds confused about something

resultTranslations.en: Confused: The caller sounds confused about something

entries.result: Unexpected: The caller's voice is unexpected in some way. For instance, they speak incredibly slowly, or in a clipped three-words-at-a-time tempo

resultTranslations.en: Unexpected: The caller's voice is unexpected in some way. For instance, they speak incredibly slowly, or in a clipped three-words-at-a-time tempo

entries.result: Bad Connection: It's difficult to hear the caller's voice to determine anything about them

resultTranslations.en: Bad Connection: It's difficult to hear the caller's voice to determine anything about them

entries.result: Buzzy: There is an almost electrical buzz to the voice. You can't tell if they're doing it intentionally, there's phone interference, or they just have an odd voice

resultTranslations.en: Buzzy: There is an almost electrical buzz to the voice. You can't tell if they're doing it intentionally, there's phone interference, or they just have an odd voice
